chunks.title: Laws on Property and Restitution
chunks.reason: A continuous section detailing specific legal penalties for theft, grazing damage, fire, bailment, and borrowing.

chunks.title: Laws on Social Relations and Worship
chunks.reason: A distinct group of laws covering seduction, sorcery, animal sacrifice, and idolatry.

chunks.title: Care for the Vulnerable and Poor
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit focusing on social justice regarding sojourners, widows, orphans, and financial loans.

chunks.title: Laws on Worship and Holiness
chunks.reason: The final section combines commands regarding God's name, harvest offerings, firstborns, and dietary purity.
